_comment: Starter MCP server configs for AIOS workspace integrations. Copy the servers you want into .mcp.json, fill in the env values (use a secrets manager or your shell env — never commit real tokens), then flip the integration's status to 'wired' in .claude/integrations.json. See docs/integrations.md for per-tool setup.

aios-team-brain._note: First-party: exposes YOUR Team Brain (read-only) to GUI agents that can't run the aios CLI — Claude Desktop, Cowork, Codex, Conductor. Shell agents should use `aios query`/`aios pull` directly. Env-first; no workspace required. See docs/integrations.md.
